channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Les meilleures voitures électriques et hybrides, les moteurs dans les roues et la batterie solaire Lidl – Récap’ Survoltés
item.description: L’actualité Survoltés a été particulièrement riche cette semaine : tests de véhicules électriques, innovations technologiques européennes et chinoises, sans oublier les nouveautés hybrides. Voici le récapitulatif des contenus les plus lus sur Survoltés ces derniers jours.

item.title: How to watch Brazil vs Morocco: Free Streams & TV Channels for FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: Here's how to watch Brazil vs Morocco for free online and from anywhere as the five-time winners face the Atlas Lions in their FIFA World Cup 2026 opener.

item.title: 'I really love the way the Cinema Mini sounds': I tested Bluesound's latest small soundbar, and it's the best compact options for audio quality — but the price puts it in dangerous territory
item.description: Some small-footprint soundbars compromise on big, robust sound, but not the Pulse Cinema Mini.

item.title: Léger et endurant, ce laptop Lenovo sous Ryzen 7 chute sous les 700 €
item.description: Si vous souhaitez changer votre équipement de travail sans pour autant vider votre compte en banque, vous pourriez par exemple miser sur le Lenovo IdeaPad Slim 3, un laptop doté d'un grand écran et qui permet d'enchaîner les tâches avec rapidité. Actuellement, cet ultrabook peut vous revenir à 699,99 euros au lieu de 899,99 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: Security firm signs up Conan O'Brien for corporate training videos — will celebrity firepower be enough to keep us focused on safety?
item.description: Adaptive Security recruited Conan O'Brien for cybersecurity training videos aimed at helping employees recognize phishing deepfakes and AI-enabled fraud.

item.title: Semiconductor stocks just had their worst week since 2020 — but it wasn't all their fault
item.description: Semiconductor stocks have had a few rough days in a market that is also digesting tough news on other fronts.

item.title: Enceintes sono (JBL, Anker…) : la sélection des meilleures enceintes de soirées
item.description: Pour écouter votre musique à fond au bord de la piscine ou même organiser un karaoké, l'enceinte de soirée portable est l'appareil idéal. Nous avons testé et rassemblé ici les meilleures enceintes sono Bluetooth de soirée.

item.title: 5 WWDC 2026 clues that tell us Apple is about to release a foldable iPhone Ultra
item.description: Through a mix of announcements and telling signs in code, Apple has almost confirmed the iPhone Ultra's existence.

item.title: OpenAI faces investigation from state attorneys general
item.description: It's not clear which states are involved, but they're asking about everything from OpenAI's ad policies to its handling of health data.

item.title: Microsoft hasn’t ruled out spinning off Xbox
item.description: Microsoft is preparing to lay off a significant chunk of its Xbox division and is reevaluating the plans for its next-generation Project Helix console. It's apparently also considering dramatically restructuring its relationship with Xbox, and hasn't ruled out spinning it off into a separate company. A new report from The Information suggests that Microsoft has […]...

item.title: The Creepshow video game is coming out this summer
item.description: The point-and-click adventure game based on the horror anthology series arrives in August.
